projects.title: mantiq
projects.short_desc: A Logical Calculator & DLD Lab Automator

content_blocks.text: Imagine finishing a brutal DLD lab report — Truth Tables, 3D K-Maps, Circuit Diagrams, Verilog code, Wave Diagrams, and a Quine-McCluskey Table — in the time it takes your classmates to draw their first grid. Manual logic simplification isn't a test of intelligence; it's a test of endurance. One miscalculated minterm, and your entire assignment goes up in smoke.
You are an engineer. It is time to stop doing a machine's job.

content_blocks.heading: Automate the Busywork
items: **The Q-M Cheat Code:** Write an expression for up to 6 variables. Mantiq generates the exact, step-by-step mathematical proof. Copy the working, secure the grade.
**K-Maps, Now in 3D:** 2D grids break down at 5+ variables. Mantiq maps complex logic into native, interactive 3D space. Spin the map and see corner adjacencies connect.
**Live Logic Topography:** Fully live editable K-maps with don't-care toggles. Watch your groupings and EPIs shift in real-time.
**Zero-Burn Simulation:** Toggle inputs and watch the signal flow through gates live. Verify architecture virtually before tracing a wire on a breadboard.
**Lab Reports on Autopilot:** Export Truth Tables straight to CSV. Pull K-Maps, circuit diagrams, and waveforms as high-res PNGs right into your document.
**Instant Verilog Compilation:** Translates your optimized logic directly into Dataflow and Gate-Level Verilog instantly.

projects.title: 9th Grudge
projects.short_desc: 2D Space Defense Engine: The Planet They Forgot

content_blocks.text: Pluto is angry about being demoted to a 'dwarf planet.' The Plutonians have invaded Earth. Defense systems are down. You are a lone satellite—humanity's last hope. A 2D space defense game where physics meets revenge.

cards.title: Survival System
cards.text: 3 lives. Earth loses 2.5 energy/sec. Destroy bases for +15 energy. Friendly fire costs -20!

cards.title: Physics & Chaos
cards.text: Real trigonometry-based orbital movement. Planet rotation speed fluctuates (1.0x to 3.5x). Meteor waves every 5 seconds.

cards.title: Encrypted Leaderboard
cards.text: Top 10 scores saved securely. Compete against parody names like Alone Musk, Bilal Gates, and Gen. Zia-ul-Lag.

content_blocks.heading: Polish & Features
items: Dynamic Context-Aware Music (15 tracks synced to Satellite Skins).
Particle Explosions (Flash, Fire, Smoke) and Comic-style Intro Slideshow.
